title: Locality
description: A coarse geographic location — country, region, and postal code. A lightweight alternative to a full postal address.

address_country.description: The country, as a 2-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. "US"). A 3-letter alpha-3 code or full country name MAY also be used.

address_region.description: The first-level administrative region within the country (e.g. a state or province such as California).
